nasb.text: Have you found honey? Eat only what you need, That you not have it in excess and vomit it.

esv.text: If you have found honey, eat only enough for you, lest you have your fill of it and vomit it.

cnv.text: 你找到蜂蜜，吃夠就好了； 免得吃得過多，就嘔吐出來。

ccb.text: 找到蜂蜜要酌量而食， 免得吃多了呕吐。

csbs.text: 你找到蜂蜜，吃够就好； 免得你过饱，把它吐出来。
